name: maushold-family-of-four
flavor_texts: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.
text: Maushold-family-of-four is the Family Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: friend-guard, cheek-pouch, technician (hidden). Base stats — HP: 74, Attack: 75, Defense: 70, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 111. Evolution line: tandemaus → maushold. Lore: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure. The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.
